name: standards-conformance generator writes the output to STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md at the configured path
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/conformance-report.sh" --out STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md ] && grep -q 'generated_at: 2026-05-13' STANDARDS-CONFORMANCE.md && echo ok 1>&2
